meaning: n.狮子,(剽悍的人)社交场合的名流
examples: The lion was stalking a zebra.
A lion is a dangerous animal.
The lion roared once and sprang.
He previously chaired the jury in 1983 when Jean-Luc Godard's First Name: Carmen was awarded the Golden Lion.
These are beers made to come on like a lion but go down like a lamb.
